integrations.tagline: Gmail, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Calendar — one connect.
integrations.longDescription: Connect your Google account once and Claude can read and send Gmail, manage Drive files, edit Docs/Sheets/Slides, and read/write Calendar events — all from chat. Setup walks you through a short OAuth flow, then verifies every service responds.

integrations.tagline: Read your iMessage threads, send texts from chat.
integrations.longDescription: Reads your chat.db directly and sends via AppleScript. Built-in access control lets you pair devices and manage an allowlist via /imessage:access. macOS only.

integrations.tagline: Read and update your Todoist tasks.
integrations.longDescription: Capture tasks from chat and review your Todoist inbox without context-switching.

integrations.tagline: Notes, Reminders, iCloud — one Apple connect.
integrations.longDescription: Reads and creates Apple Notes, manages Reminders lists, and syncs files to iCloud Drive — all through a single macOS integration. Uses native Apple APIs so it stays fast and doesn't depend on the web UI.

integrations.tagline: Drive any macOS app from chat.
integrations.longDescription: Generate and run AppleScript against the apps you already use. macOS only.

integrations.tagline: Draft designs, decks, and posts from chat.
integrations.longDescription: Pull Canva designs into a conversation, edit copy, and export new versions without switching tabs. Planned OAuth flow — will land alongside Canva's stable public API.

integrations.tagline: Your repos, issues, and PRs in chat.
integrations.longDescription: Reads repos, drafts PR descriptions, triages issues, and runs common gh commands through a signed-in GitHub session. Pairs with code-review and civic-report.

integrations.tagline: Drive your Mac — open apps, click, type.
integrations.longDescription: Lets Claude open apps, click, type, take screenshots, and drive the macOS desktop directly. Think of it as giving your Mac hands. Permissions-gated and macOS only.

integrations.tagline: Drive your PC — open apps, click, type.
integrations.longDescription: Lets Claude open apps, click, type, take screenshots, and drive the Windows desktop directly. Permissions-gated and Windows only. Sibling to macOS Control.
